name: Heart Rubber Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™ Pink
description:
Delight your furry friend with this Heart Rubber Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This fun toy features an orange heart design with glitter accents for eye-catching appeal. Made from TPR material, it's perfect for satisfying your dog's chewing needs as well as entertaining them with games of fetch.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
